---
title: "Generative Structures Proof Audit"
---

This appendix keeps the theorem-card trail for the [Generative Structures](generative.qmd) lesson. The lesson explains seed-rule provenance and exact regeneration; this page is for checking the finite proof family.

::: {.warning-box}
These theorem cards prove finite regeneration, orbit, equality, and bounded-search facts. They do not prove global minimality, universal compression, or that a generator record is always smaller or more meaningful than explicit storage.
:::

## Orbit And Regeneration Spine

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0002"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0003"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0006"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0007"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0008"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0009"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0010"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0011"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0012"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0013"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0014"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0015"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0016"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0017"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0018"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0019"></div>

## Generated Lists And Bounded Search

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0020"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0021"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0022"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0023"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0024"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0025"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0026"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0027"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0028"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0029"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0030"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0031"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0032"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0033"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0034"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0035"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0036"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0037"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0038"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0039"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0040"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0041"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0042"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0043"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0044"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0045"></div>

## Storage Accounting

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0046"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0047"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0048"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0049"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="GEN-T0050"></div>

## Source Trail

<p data-paper-ref="papers/generative/PAPER_GEN_01_SEED_RULE_PROVENANCE.md">Generative paper: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/generative/PAPER_GEN_01_SEED_RULE_PROVENANCE.md">Seed-Rule Provenance</a></p>
<p data-paper-ref="papers/S1/PAPER_S1_04_FACTORS_SCALING_PRIME_COILS.md">S1 source paper: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/S1/PAPER_S1_04_FACTORS_SCALING_PRIME_COILS.md">Factors, Scaling, And Prime Coils</a></p>
<p data-paper-ref="papers/phase2/PAPER_P2_05_PROOF_CARRYING_GLYPHS.md">Glyph paper: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/phase2/PAPER_P2_05_PROOF_CARRYING_GLYPHS.md">Proof-Carrying Glyphs</a></p>
<p data-paper-ref="papers/physics/PAPER_PHYS_01_PROOF_CARRYING_LATTICE_GAUGE.md">Physics source paper: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/physics/PAPER_PHYS_01_PROOF_CARRYING_LATTICE_GAUGE.md">Proof-Carrying Finite Lattice Gauge Links</a></p>

<div class="book-navigation">
<a href="generative.qmd">Back: Generative Structures</a>
<a href="compute.qmd">Next: Compute</a>
</div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
